# Tenon Hardware

> Maldives' modern hardware store — power tools, building materials, plumbing, electrical, fasteners and more from globally recognised brands.

Tenon Hardware is based in Malé, Maldives and serves customers across the archipelago, including Thinadhoo (Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll). We supply builders, contractors, and homeowners with quality hardware products at competitive prices.

## What We Sell

- Power tools and hand tools (DeWalt, Bosch, Makita, Stanley, and more)
- Building materials and structural supplies
- Plumbing fittings, pipes and fixtures
- Electrical components, cables and accessories
- Fasteners — bolts, screws, anchors, nails
- Safety equipment and workwear
- Paints, adhesives and sealants

## Services

- Same-day delivery in Greater Malé for orders placed before 2 pm
- Island delivery across the Maldives
- Bulk/trade orders for contractors and construction companies
- Product inquiries via WhatsApp and email

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +960 7997970
- Email: sales@tenon.mv
- Address: Boduthakurufaanu Magu, Malé 20026, Maldives
